new blog post: Post Office

Welcome to Hwii.net, the most website on the Internet. It doesn't get any websiter than this!

If you're looking for content, you're out-of-luck. There's nothing here except for noise. There is no escape from noise. Well actually, there's this weblog that you can take a look at. It'll probably have some rants, daydreaming, talkin' about code, cats, candy, cool stuff. Yeah.
